**BREAKING: Trump Admin Pushes Supreme Court to Strike Down the Affordable Care Act!**
In the middle of a global health crisis, with the number of Americans hospitalized with the virus increasing, Trump and Republicans are _still_ trying to rip away health care coverage for as many as 23 _million_ people.
Polls now show Trump's approval rate tanking, but we haven't heard where you stand. Friend, we need you to speak out NOW about this UNACCEPTABLE Republican attack on our health care. **But our poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight, so speak out ASAP:**

| | Curtis Hill is the worst Attorney General in Indiana's history. He lost his law license, committed criminal battery, and has been under fire for sexual misconduct with multiple women. Hill is dedicated to taking away over 560,000 Hoosiers’ health care, robbing the LGBTQ+ community of their rights, and making sure Hoosiers can’t exercise their right to choose. **Curtis Hill must go.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18157002/219145078/-1538199371?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=Everyone.EMAIL.7.7.20.express_lane_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWFlY2NmOS0zYWMwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbj7hH9vYuKGcCTEzTm66D5qwgN2bll5f66uACucgwQ=)** It’s no surprise that the Cook Political Report moved the Indiana Attorney General's race from "leans Republican" to "toss-up." name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 7/6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkiriukk-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friends, One month from today, you will have a choice ahead of you. A career insider versus a conservative outsider. I'm running for United States Senate to represent our conservative Tennessee values. With Early Voting starting on July 17th and Election Day on August 6th, I would sure appreciate your vote. Once again, I spent time in all three Grand Divisions this week. I enjoyed spending time in Putnam, Knox, Rutherford, Carroll, Gibson, Crockett, Madison, Robertson, and Sequatchie Counties. I hope you'll join me at one of our next townhalls near you. **Events:** This week, I'll be doing townhalls in Anderson, Blount, Scott, Loudon, and Maury Counties. I'll be sharing why I'm running for the Senate and taking your questions. I hope you'll join us! Stay up to date with where we'll be next at [DrMannyForSenate.com/Events](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkiriukk-olhhkyhhid-j/).
**News:** This week, I was honored to receive the endorsements of State Representative Rick Eldridge, State Representative Bruce Griffey, and Joe Carr. These men are conservative leaders that I will try to emulate in the US Senate. I am honored by their support. I'm grateful to WBBJ in Jackson for coming to cover my townhall at Brooks Shaw's Old Country store last Thursday. [Watch the report here.](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkiriukk-olhhkyhhid-t/) **Social Media:** We had an incredible turnout at our townhall at Slick Pig BBQ in Murfreesboro last Wednesday. I was honored to be joined by my friend Joe Carr. The food was great too! I look forward to seeing you out on the road! Keep an eye on our [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkiriukk-olhhkyhhid-i/) and [drmannyforsenate.com/events](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkiriukk-olhhkyhhid-d/) to see where I'll be next! Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkiriukk-olhhkyhhid-h/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkiriukk-olhhkyhhid-k/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkiriukk-olhhkyhhid-u/) to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! We're going to continue traveling all across the state meeting each and every one of you. Let's win this thing! Dr. Manny P.S. There is only **1 MONTH** until Election Day![ A donation right now will help me reach the US Senate and be a true representative of YOU, instead of a Washington insider. ](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkiriukk-olhhkyhhid-o/) [DoNATe herE](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkiriukk-olhhkyhhid-b/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

Once again, I spent time in all three Grand Divisions this week. I enjoyed spending time in Putnam, Knox, Rutherford, Carroll, Gibson, Crockett, Madison, Robertson, and Sequatchie Counties. I hope you'll join me at one of our next townhalls near you. Events: This week, I'll be doing townhalls in Anderson, Blount, Scott, Loudon, and Maury Counties. I'll be sharing why I'm running for the Senate and taking your questions. I hope you'll join us! Stay up to date with where we'll be next at . News: This week, I was honored to receive the endorsements of State Representative Rick Eldridge, State Representative Bruce Griffey, and Joe Carr. These men are conservative leaders that I will try to emulate in the US Senate. I am honored by their support. I'm grateful to WBBJ in Jackson for coming to cover my townhall at Brooks Shaw's Old Country store last Thursday. Social Media: We had an incredible turnout at our townhall at Slick Pig BBQ in Murfreesboro last Wednesday. I was honored to be joined by my friend Joe Carr. The food was great too! I look forward to seeing you out on the road! Keep an eye on our and to see where I'll be next! Follow us on , , and to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! We're going to continue traveling all across the state meeting each and every one of you. Let's win this thing! Dr. Manny P.S. There is only 1 MONTH until Election Day Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Dr. Manny for U.S. Senate | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | |

The latest episode of Red, White, & True is up! This week, I had the pleasure of speaking to my dear friend Debbie D’Souza. Debbie was born in Caracas, Venezuela, and has seen firsthand how the country dissolved from a prosperous republic to a destitute dictatorship. And she warns us that what's happening here won't stop unless we engage in the fight to stop it. Debbie tells it like it is. Give this a listen and let us know what you think.
[**And if you came here from another country and have a story to tell, let us hear from you!**](mailto:info@truethevote.org)

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: COVID-19 - We All Have To Do Our Part
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18157767/219189403/-276570889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmRlNWFiOC01MWMwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoHtipcD32-5Z-cbajoN99L0R5uMz7V8kMm8Vgeijfk=&emci=2a52a3f2-44c0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=e6de5ab8-51c0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10438639) _Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is running for the open seat in the 17th District.[**Chip in to his campaign here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18157768/219189404/1282771135?refcode=07072020_em_su_tk_b1_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmRlNWFiOC01MWMwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoHtipcD32-5Z-cbajoN99L0R5uMz7V8kMm8Vgeijfk=)_
* * *
---
Dear Friend, In mid-April, the President and many elected Republicans placed a bet. They bet that if they pushed to reopen our economy, the recession would take on the "V" shape they coveted, and a rapid economic recovery would propel them to victory in November. But rather than uniting us behind the need to fight the virus __and__ restore our economy, they reverted to magical thinking and denial. Even now, as case counts soar, messaging from our political leadership is fragmented and conflicted, often breaking along party lines. **I'll be clear. Containing the virus and restoring our economy, our very society, is not an either/or battle.** We must do __both__ simultaneously, and we must be prepared for a prolonged effort. So please:
* Protect yourself and your family. Avoid prolonged indoor gatherings with people outside your immediate cohort - especially if people are not wearing masks. Wash your hands frequently and thoroughly.
* Protect _others_ by wearing a mask when out in public. Masks are not perfect, but they significantly reduce transmission. It's a minor inconvenience with large impact. If you are a patriot, and you want to restore our health and prosperity as quickly as possible, do your part and wear a mask.
* Patronize local businesses who are taking steps to protect both you, their customers, and their employees as we balance the public health risks and the economic impacts.
* _Refuse_ to patronize businesses who are not taking these steps.
* Support, if you can, your church, local food bank, NGO or charity that might be experiencing a drop off in donations.
* Demand that Congress stop the piecemeal, week to week approach it has been taking and put in place a plan that funds the test/trace/isolate capability we need, supports impacted families and businesses, and most importantly acknowledges the reality that it will take months if not years to overcome these challenges.

The most basic function of government is to protect the lives and livelihoods of the people, not gamble with them. _**[Demand Better. Click here or a button below to pitch in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18157769/219189405/-1907457920?refcode=07072020_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmRlNWFiOC01MWMwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoHtipcD32-5Z-cbajoN99L0R5uMz7V8kMm8Vgeijfk=)**_ _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18157770/219189406/1282771135?refcode=07072020_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmRlNWFiOC01MWMwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoHtipcD32-5Z-cbajoN99L0R5uMz7V8kMm8Vgeijfk=)** | **[$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18157771/219189407/1282771135?refcode=07072020_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmRlNWFiOC01MWMwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoHtipcD32-5Z-cbajoN99L0R5uMz7V8kMm8Vgeijfk=)** | **[$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18157772/219189408/1282771135?refcode=07072020_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmRlNWFiOC01MWMwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoHtipcD32-5Z-cbajoN99L0R5uMz7V8kMm8Vgeijfk=)**

clean_body: | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is running for the open seat in the 17th District.= Dear Friend, In mid-April, the President and many elected Republicans placed a bet. They bet that if they pushed to reopen our economy, the recession would take on the "V" shape they coveted, and a rapid economic recovery would propel them to victory in November. But rather than uniting us behind the need to fight the virus and restore our economy, they reverted to magical thinking and denial. Even now, as case counts soar, messaging from our political leadership is fragmented and conflicted, often breaking along party lines. I'll be clear. Containing the virus and restoring our economy, our very society, is not an either/or battle. We must do both simultaneously, and we must be prepared for a prolonged effort. So please: Protect yourself and your family. Avoid prolonged indoor gatherings with people outside your immediate cohort - especially if people are not wearing masks. Wash your hands frequently and thoroughly. Protect others by wearing a mask when out in public. Masks are not perfect, but they significantly reduce transmission. It's a minor inconvenience with large impact. If you are a patriot, and you want to restore our health and prosperity as quickly as possible, do your part and wear a mask. Patronize local businesses who are taking steps to protect both you, their customers, and their employees as we balance the public health risks and the economic impacts. Refuse to patronize businesses who are not taking these steps. Support, if you can, your church, local food bank, NGO or charity that might be experiencing a drop off in donations. Demand that Congress stop the piecemeal, week to week approach it has been taking and put in place a plan that funds the test/trace/isolate capability we need, supports impacted families and businesses, and most importantly acknowledges the reality that it will take months if not years to overcome these challenges. The most basic function of government is to protect the lives and livelihoods of the people, not gamble with them. = If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | =** Thank you, and stay safe. Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

body:
The lack of concern shown by the Trump administration is immoral, callous, and dangerous.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18159988/219223103/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODJlM2M2My01Y2MwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1e8SkYugdfiUTm077PBs551azluRD8MeOetYNDpTekA=&emci=f7be636d-50c0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=e82e3c63-5cc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644) Friends,

With record numbers of families facing unemployment, thousands have lost their health insurance coverage. And as COVID-19 continues to spread, the Trump administration filed a legal brief to strike down the Affordable Care Act last week.

The lack of concern shown by the Trump administration is immoral, callous, and dangerous.

**[Stand with Margaret and add your name to send a message to Trump that we should be expanding access to health insurance, not cutting it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18159989/219223104/-1338019308?contactdata=HzxDavEuMkHXe9mGIdyFrUK2tkVGdjB5WxKC8NEALA4OhpgvWne4TAjmWw85OVfKYe%2BBNB1PPK8h19sy6OORQeSk5nMbin3K8FVAYX95P%2FxoTKtBFQdsOGeMC5HAsrv0oJlAhU%2BfoGJHH4%2F7FqItNQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODJlM2M2My01Y2MwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1e8SkYugdfiUTm077PBs551azluRD8MeOetYNDpTekA=&emci=f7be636d-50c0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=e82e3c63-5cc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644)**

Instead of leading the nation through these trying times with empathy and intelligence, he’s prioritized cutting coverage.

And rather than ensuring Americans are safe, healthy, and able to work, Trump continues to prioritize the wealth of few Americans over the well-being of millions.

This latest move means that millions across the country could lose their health insurance coverage.

**[Please, stand with us in support of the Affordable Care Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18159990/219223105/-1338019308?contactdata=HzxDavEuMkHXe9mGIdyFrUK2tkVGdjB5WxKC8NEALA4OhpgvWne4TAjmWw85OVfKYe%2BBNB1PPK8h19sy6OORQeSk5nMbin3K8FVAYX95P%2FxoTKtBFQdsOGeMC5HAsrv0oJlAhU%2BfoGJHH4%2F7FqItNQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODJlM2M2My01Y2MwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1e8SkYugdfiUTm077PBs551azluRD8MeOetYNDpTekA=&emci=f7be636d-50c0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=e82e3c63-5cc0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644)**

| Dear Friend, Today (Tuesday, July 7th) is New Jersey's Republican Primary Election, and like me I'll bet you're ready to throw Cory Booker out of politics — _for good_.

Casting your vote is easy, and you've got a few options. If you were **mailed** a ballot, fill it out and choose any of the following:
* Mail it back to the Board of Elections
* Drop it off by hand at a nearby drop box
* Bring it in person to your local County Clerk's office
* Bring it in person to your local Board of Elections

If you were _not_ mailed a ballot, [contact your county clerk](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=f2fc3b8350&e=3e017fab0f) and see if you can get one. **Otherwise, you can vote by Provisional Ballot at your closest polling location.**

Ballots that were mailed or dropped off will get counted first, so these methods are preferable. Local ballot drop-off locations can be found here: [NJ Ballot Drop Box Locations](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=190c05bcae&e=3e017fab0f)

You can also find a convenient polling location by using New Jersey's online locator. Just enter your details here to get started: [NJ Polling Place Search Tool](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=48252bc0ca&e=3e017fab0f)

## All polling places are open from 6AM till 8PM. **Remember to vote for HIRSH SINGH, the _only _Trump conservative running! **

New Jersey sits on the edge of a new dawn, and this is our opportunity to help Keep America Great. You can help us kick Cory Booker out of politics and retake our beautiful state from corrupt RINOs and Democrat establishment cronies — but only if you cast your vote!

Thanks for voting with us!
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**
_For the People_
Republican for U.S. Senate

---

Earlier this year, _National Journal_ named Scott Perry the most vulnerable Republican in Congress, and _Roll Call_ listed PA-10 as one of two seats most likely to flip from Republican to Democrat.

**Now, with just four months until the election, all eyes are on the grassroots movement happening right here in PA-10.**

**[It’s clear that South Central Pennsylvanians are ready to reject Scott Perry and his special interest backers and elect a proven, independent leader like Eugene. name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: Like an ill-fitting suit
body:
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | Dear Friend,

I know you are being inundated with requests for donations from everyone ... including us. And it's the thing I least like to do. We have always been about the work, so when we have to amp up the fundraising requests it feels like an ill-fitting suit. It's just ... yuck.

So, yes, this is yet another fundraising request. Please bear with us. Unlike the large national campaigns, we aren't raising millions of dollars. We don't have 500% matches. We aren't sending out emails, letters, texts, and calls to massive lists of people. This is just us, on the ground, working non-stop to help protect elections in ways that sometimes make headlines, but more often than not go totally unseen, but they still must be done. Here are a few of the things we're doing right now:
---
| | |
---
| | | |
* Call Your County We are trying to get a grip on what is happening with the general election in the 3,141 counties and county-equivalents across the country. As we all know, election processes are in flux. There is NO central database of what counties need - so, as per usual, we're rolling up our sleeves to contact counties, figure out what’s happening, and spread the word. You can learn more about Call Your County by [clicking here](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=81A126A14A691)!

* Fighting in Court We're still litigating to stop the rampant mail ballot/no ID/no signature verification/vote harvesting quadfecta. I can't announce the new states just yet, but they are coming soon.

---
| | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=81A126A14A691)
---
| |
* Research To support the above litigation we've been doing a massive amount of research on voter data and the real impact of mail-ballots across all voter groups. We hope this will be useful not just to our cases but to others nationwide.

* Podcasts We are producing a weekly podcast called Red, White, and True News. [You can check it out here!](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=81A126A14A692) Last week we had Debbie D'Souza on the show. Debbie was born in Venezuela and still has family there. The parallels of what happened there when the Socialists began to push for control and what is happening here now...truly frightening.

* Training Hub We are hosting[ trainings and curriculum ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=81A126A14A693)for election integrity efforts across the country. If you are working with a group and would like help getting trainings organized, please let us know!

* Organizing We are training, speaking to, assisting, and supporting citizens and citizen-led groups across the country who are willing to work to defend election integrity. They need help - and we want to be there for as many of them as we possibly can be.

There’s more going on, this is just a quick pass at our day to day, but suffice to say we are all in. And if we could do this without funds we would. But we can’t. [ We need your help.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=81A126A14A694)[ ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=81A126A14A694)

**We are 119 days away from the biggest election of our lifetime. The deep state, globalists, marxists, socialists, leftists, radicalized democrats, wayward republicans, call them what you will...they are destroying our country. **[**WE ARE WORKING TO MOBILIZE A MILLION PEOPLE TO WORK IN THE POLLS**](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=81A126A14A695)******to protect free and fair elections. True the Vote is small, but we are determined, and we are doing everything we can to help stem this tide.****[ Please help us if you can. Any amount is helpful - it will all be put to immediate use doing what I’ve described above and more. ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=81A126A14A694)** **If not, we understand, but if you would, please forward this on to your friends and ask them to help. Volunteer, give, keep forwarding ... and please don’t give up.**

---
| | [ DONATE ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=81A126A14A694)
---
| | We’re all in this together. We the people. We the voters. We the volunteers who love this country.
And working together we really can true the vote.

Never, ever, ever, ever, ever, ever quit.

Onward -

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder
True the Vote

PS One more thing...we have to keep working to raise funds. I apologize in advance. Like I said above, this feels like an ill-fitting suit, but it is what it is. We appreciate you more than you can know. Thank you so much for your continued support.

---
Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](http://truethevote.acemlnb.com/proc.php?nl=14&c=81&m=126&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&act=unsub)

True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Let's make our Congress reflect our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
We need more Black leaders in the Senate and House, and I'm running to be one of them.
| | |
---
Friend,

We need more Black leaders in the Senate and House, and I'm running to be one of them.
This has been on my mind as our nation struggles against two pandemics: COVID-19, the respiratory virus, and COVID-1619, the virus of racism that has plagued us since the first slave ships arrived on American shores in 1619.
In the 400 years since then, we've witnessed this virus mutate into new and dangerous forms: Disparities between Black Americans and others in the realms of health care, economic opportunity and criminal justice. Voter suppression. And lack of representation in the halls of Congress. Throughout our history, only _10_ _ _ out of the nearly 2,000 individual U.S. senators have been Black - not because only 10 were deserving or capable enough to lead, but because systemic racism has been cemented into our institutions.
**It's time to crack that cement. I'm ready to bring this fight for justice to the Senate and become the first Black senator _ever_ elected from Georgia, but I can't win without your help: ****[Please, if you're with me, will you donate $5 right now to help us hit our critical midnight goal so we can flip Georgia blue and make our Senate reflect our country?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e53a/288179be/824ddb9/348e5e22/2803450823/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzgwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk380-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Here's the thing, friend: I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, and I worked my way up to serving as senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. But the opportunities that made my journey possible - from Kayton Homes to Dr. King's pulpit - are becoming further and further out of reach for too many across this country.
I'm running for Senate to change that and fight so that _everyone - _no matter who you are, the color of your skin or where you come from - has a shot at the American dream.
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate. We have a _historic_ opportunity to write the next chapter of our nation's history and restore real leadership to Washington - **but it won't be easy, and I need the support of folks like you to make it happen:**
**[That's why I'm personally asking you, friend: If you're in this fight to flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and make our Congress reflect our country- will you please donate $5 or more by midnight to fuel our grassroots movement for change? We can claim our place in the history books but _only_ with your critical support.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e53a/288179be/824ddb9/348e5e22/2803450823/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzgwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk380-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Reverend Warnock
|

clean_body: We need more Black leaders in the Senate and House, and I'm running to be one of them. | | | Friend, We need more Black leaders in the Senate and House, and I'm running to be one of them. This has been on my mind as our nation struggles against two pandemics: COVID-19, the respiratory virus, and COVID-1619, the virus of racism that has plagued us since the first slave ships arrived on American shores in 1619. In the 400 years since then, we've witnessed this virus mutate into new and dangerous forms: Disparities between Black Americans and others in the realms of health care, economic opportunity and criminal justice. Voter suppression. And lack of representation in the halls of Congress. Throughout our history, only 10 out of the nearly 2,000 individual U.S. senators have been Black - not because only 10 were deserving or capable enough to lead, but because systemic racism has been cemented into our institutions. It's time to crack that cement. I'm ready to bring this fight for justice to the Senate and become the first Black senator ever elected from Georgia, but I can't win without your help: "" Here's the thing, friend: I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, and I worked my way up to serving as senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. But the opportunities that made my journey possible - from Kayton Homes to Dr. King's pulpit - are becoming further and further out of reach for too many across this country. I'm running for Senate to change that and fight so that everyone - no matter who you are, the color of your skin or where you come from - has a shot at the American dream. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate. We have a historic opportunity to write the next chapter of our nation's history and restore real leadership to Washington - but it won't be easy, and I need the support of folks like you to make it happen: "" Thank you, Reverend Warnock | | Reverend Raphael Warnock is running for Senate to expand access to health care, defend the dignity of working people and fight voter suppression. Please, pitch in now to elect Reverend Warnock and flip Georgia blue! | | | ""

body:

The runoff is one week away, Peter, and we need to make sure we reach every single voter we can! As a combat veteran and working mom who's faced the challenges so many Texas families deal with every day, we know MJ has what it takes to defeat Sen. Cornyn in November.

**[But she has to win the runoff first, so donate now to help us hit our goal of bringing in 500 new donors by midnight tonight!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489014b/7f51f7bc/41175835/4ef60173/2588244475/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffoneweek?refcode=email_20200707.1nd__1665__&amount=10")**

We need to make sure we reach EVERY voter possible! With so many undecided voters out there, it's going to take hard work and a lot of resources. **Will you pitch in to help us reach our goal and give Texas a win?**
**_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_**

name: Mary & the TNDP Team
subject: Today is the Last Day to Register to Vote for the August Election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Today is the last day to register to vote or update your voter registration for the August primary election.
If 2020 has shown us anything, it's that leadership matters. Leadership matters at the local level, in the state, and in Washington D.C.
On August 6th, you'll vote in a primary to choose which Democrat will be on your ballot in the November general election. With so much at stake, and with you so many of your friends and neighbors stepping up to register and vote [https://www.tennessean.com/story/news/politics/2020/07/04/tennessee-vote-mail-absentee-ballot-requests-soar-before-primary/5355011002/] , you can't sit this one out.
*
REGISTER TO VOTE:
Here
[https://ovr.govote.tn.gov/]
*
CHECK YOUR VOTER REGISTRATION STATUS:
Here
[https://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup/]

*
CHECK YOUR ELECTION DAY POLLING LOCATION & HOURS: Here
[https://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup/]

*
EARLY
VOTING:
Early voting locations and times vary from county to county so contact your local county election commission [https://tnsos.org/elections/election_commissions.php] to find:
Locations, days and times
Sample ballots
On Election Day, August 6, you will have to vote at your assigned precinct, which you can search for here.

[https://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup/]

*

*
ABSENTEE
VOTING
:
If you are a registered voter and do not wish to vote in-person due to the COVID-19 situation, you are eligible to request an absentee ballot by mail. You also have the option to vote in-person during early voting or on Election Day. More info on absentee ballots can be found
[https://sos.tn.gov/products/elections/absentee-voting]
.

*
DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATES:
Visit TNDP.org for a list of all Democrats on the ballot
[https://tndp.org/2020-democratic-candidates/]

*
PROBLEMS?
Call
the
TNDP
voter
protection
team
at
615-327-9779
Thank you and happy voting!
Mary & the TNDP Team
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

Leadership matters at the local level, in the state, and in Washington D.C. On August 6th, you'll vote in a primary to choose which Democrat will be on your ballot in the November general election. With so much at stake, and with you so many of your friends and neighbors stepping up to register and vote [] , you can't sit this one out. REGISTER TO VOTE: Here [] CHECK YOUR VOTER REGISTRATION STATUS: Here [] CHECK YOUR ELECTION DAY POLLING LOCATION & HOURS: Here [] EARLY VOTING: Early voting locations and times vary from county to county so contact your local county election commission [] to find: Locations, days and times Sample ballots On Election Day, August 6, you will have to vote at your assigned precinct, which you can search for here. [] ABSENTEE VOTING : If you are a registered voter and do not wish to vote in-person due to the COVID-19 situation, you are eligible to request an absentee ballot by mail. You also have the option to vote in-person during early voting or on Election Day. More info on absentee ballots can be found [] . DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATES: Visit TNDP.org for a list of all Democrats on the ballot [] PROBLEMS? Call the TNDP voter protection team at 615-327-9779 Thank you and happy voting! Mary & the TNDP Team PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE. Tennessee Democratic Party 319 Plus Park Blvd Nashville, TN 37217 United States

name: Betsy R.
subject: Big news from Eric Holder!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
The National Democratic Redistricting Committee (NDRC) is targeting just 12 states this cycle - the states, like Ohio, where it's most important to flip seats in the legislature to get rid of gerrymandering when re-districting takes place in 2021. _**It 's BIG news that Attorney General Eric Holder recognizes this race in Senate District 18 as a key race, and has targeted this seat as one of two senate seats in Ohio that can flip! **_That is thanks to you - volunteers, donors, supporters of my race. The NDRC targets races they know can win, and our grassroots support is making the nation take note. You give us the heart and momentum we need to cross the finish line in November. _Can you show your commitment to fair districts in Ohio with a $20 donation today?_ _Let 's show the NDRC they've picked the right races in Ohio to invest in!_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FGxklV6TX0yJ77szuCfx9cFeUQ1JDgEe1iHNo_IKBOg=/Ni8JlgCVgQmkVxo7NxoIPPrEqMEdbdg38sx50v1rWb4=?refcode=NDRC7.7&amount=20) [The NDRC](https://act.myngp.com/el/FGxklV6TX0yJ77szuCfx9cFeUQ1JDgEe1iHNo_IKBOg=/hU7efp3cKrvhkQtawNeEm35yVMp1adpt5D3emA_OiEU=) uses a comprehensive approach: advancing legal action, mobilizing grassroots energy, supporting reforms, and winning targeted elections. With the NDRC's support and yours, we can win this race. Then we fight for a fairer democratic process and fairer maps that accurately represent the people of Ohio. Thanks so much for helping to make this happen. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FGxklV6TX0yJ77szuCfx9cFeUQ1JDgEe1iHNo_IKBOg=/Ni8JlgCVgQmkVxo7NxoIPPrEqMEdbdg38sx50v1rWb4=?refcode=NDRC7.7) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FGxklV6TX0yJ77szuCfx9cFeUQ1JDgEe1iHNo_IKBOg=/WxH_ovVlc4S5WXQpv-rFO84vuoqdQTm3NDnal5MX9Vw=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FGxklV6TX0yJ77szuCfx9cFeUQ1JDgEe1iHNo_IKBOg=/mTXPpsGt-32NM8MCzODfezUafgUjfFInLRB2Cl3mhtY=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FGxklV6TX0yJ77szuCfx9cFeUQ1JDgEe1iHNo_IKBOg=/KmyMZI98a3XMTuRVM3g7e0qHDuQCZOfcvzIvDnunWLo=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FGxklV6TX0yJ77szuCfx9cFeUQ1JDgEe1iHNo_IKBOg=/SlB37BCRwCEdcvEM2L-Yup9qzWMWgzT4hf74QBGegH8=)

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: Focus group invite #4012679 for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
There are only 41 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17. |
---
Peter,

There are only 41 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17, where Joe Biden will become our OFFICIAL Democratic nominee for President.

This is going to be a huge moment for Democrats across the country, and we know everyone is going to be fired up about electing Joe Biden and defeating Donald Trump!

**So we've really got to hustle to put the final touches on our strategy for maximizing this momentum, and we need your help.**

[ Will you be a part of our Pre-Convention Focus Group and answer a few quick survey questions for us?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931beeb/1cd0ac28/876c4ac0/357ce2d8/3591661589/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__full") | [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931beeb/1cd0ac28/876c4ac0/357ce2d8/3591661589/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931beeb/1cd0ac28/876c4ac0/357ce2d8/3591661589/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
We'll have the top of our Democratic ticket locked in (including Joe's future running mate!) and _less than three months_ left to defeat Donald Trump by the convention's closing.

But it's not just about taking back the White House -- we also have to keep (and expand on!) our majority in the House, take back the Senate, and put more Democrats in office across all 50 states.

So when we say we need everyone to join our coalition to elect Joe and defeat Trump, we mean _everyone_!

The convention is going to be a huge moment to build momentum and bring more folks on to Team Joe, so we want your feedback on our plan to do that.

[So even if you've answered questions like this before, we count on surveys like this to gather new data and percentages as our team grows and new events (like the convention!) take place.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931beeb/1cd0ac28/876c4ac0/357ce2d8/3591661589/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

**Peter, we'll be going over your responses this week, so can you please submit your feedback today? It only takes a few minutes, and it will make a big impact on our strategy moving forward.**
[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931beeb/1cd0ac28/876c4ac0/357ce2d8/3591661589/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Thanks,

JoeBiden.com

clean_body: There are only 41 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17. | Peter, There are only 41 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17, where Joe Biden will become our OFFICIAL Democratic nominee for President. This is going to be a huge moment for Democrats across the country, and we know everyone is going to be fired up about electing Joe Biden and defeating Donald Trump! So we've really got to hustle to put the final touches on our strategy for maximizing this momentum, and we need your help. "" | "" "" We'll have the top of our Democratic ticket locked in (including Joe's future running mate!) and less than three months left to defeat Donald Trump by the convention's closing. But it's not just about taking back the White House -- we also have to keep (and expand on!) our majority in the House, take back the Senate, and put more Democrats in office across all 50 states. So when we say we need everyone to join our coalition to elect Joe and defeat Trump, we mean everyone! The convention is going to be a huge moment to build momentum and bring more folks on to Team Joe, so we want your feedback on our plan to do that. "" Peter, we'll be going over your responses this week, so can you please submit your feedback today? It only takes a few minutes, and it will make a big impact on our strategy moving forward. "" Thanks, JoeBiden.com | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

body:
The extremists in our country want to defund the very organization that protects our communities, families, and homes rather than coming up with solut [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=adb0ce51e5f648b8b7e7808f57dc7294&_e=p51TkZ5-ObqL_5oPACOq9USd5KRLoZ1tWfmpKUlA5LxkWQgQZhYAUi2Oh59PWMJtIS8ksTLOHX87HhrE7pnQwK4Yib5kcEFagBq4gWNsHgIJs8K4P5owr5SilC6i1L-QNtKAQlI-audXR1vlmc81gpAzDJ832oJHHbbtRTGohKeV7ZbHOmNgTe3qwXA4fvnSoduy_ycDrrZbqsJcTlUac8rnvuldthIrX-I6TEyvvRVGtJ2GoYe-2odj5L6h9cdjFu-XS5n_lXksJGlVrax0r7ERZyQt2DkDH94cZSYlOU1lUfAOJ5EUvHsBDX1tF5qBV__yqf-T_O-Z2JfOslAqAQ%3D%3D) Friend, The extremists in our country want to defund the very organization that protects our communities, families, and homes rather than coming up with solutions that can better unite our country. The “defund the police” movement is incredibly reckless and exceedingly dangerous to our communities and to our nation. [**Say NO to Defunding the Police**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=adb0ce51e5f648b8b7e7808f57dc7294&_e=p51TkZ5-ObqL_5oPACOq9USd5KRLoZ1tWfmpKUlA5LxkWQgQZhYAUi2Oh59PWMJtIS8ksTLOHX87HhrE7pnQwK4Yib5kcEFagBq4gWNsHgIJs8K4P5owr5SilC6i1L-QfzUSOxh8n4BKldvg7H2C5jwDiUWKGAdaPOZE2L7EdozB0ZUrgCft5nMn_NjRaIv-77VSEyAocbpMqqfVu0Nj1AjimPhltsdugEoWwF-YNCz-WAEts5Z3tqNM1LnMOSQsrFUwnvlceaY3gRgYurMipQChRo8UQPELU_A3s3DbA_WSuY6upljvrsdZTXuEBibmpI-BanquUJL2-pKhxyIpRA%3D%3D) We are a nation of rule and law, not mob rule. name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: An update on our election results
body:
Peter,

Since we’ve been receiving an influx of questions and emails from supporters who, like us, are excitedly awaiting the final election results, I wanted to send around a brief update on where we stand and what comes next.

As you may know, voters in our district requested over 70,000 mail-in ballots, more than the total number of ballots cast in-person during both the early voting period and on Primary Day. The New York City Board of Elections isn’t expected to begin counting these ballots until later this week, so it’s hard to predict when we’ll know the final outcome. But every vote must be counted and every voice must be heard, which is why we can’t yet conclude who Central Brooklyn’s next Democratic Congressional nominee will be.

This long process is only just beginning, and we’ll continue to share any new developments as we learn them.

Best,
Adem

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: Trump’s COVID Cure: Ignore Till It Goes Away
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTEgA_tUj7CRd5QkjrdargpVqlTSrDduBFpTnQvavjLk-KzHsvkJ1yQ_tD07diQBStK2N8yeiP1JMe1Bxa0pb5m7c-LMRqnnLjI56XyvHHY86p7xPriKnjR5IjzTI3iU2N6aKLSWkWEAEwYNPIjqfshHT5ZSq-YQX68qdERFWx2dxTAm1pGERbNkpWTIaDko_G/339/dpyiP4MdTBaoAPsMyZvj_g/h0/uUoX_p7SLDRM4h_cLEdFtlT0JR0VGhnZKlNsg_WxnzA) Team —

While **America’s leading experts on infectious disease** warn of a pandemic trending dangerously in the wrong direction, **America’s leading expert on misdirection** is hopeful — and pretty sure — that COVID-19 is going to dissipate into thin air.

Trump’s narrative on COVID has been steady: our tests are the best, our high cases confirm this, and all of the scary numbers are irrelevant because the whole thing will blow over when we stop talking about it.

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0n5Qb5xjaWQ-ETscSkvkipr0z-tXS-YzTqrn3xkEeo8tjnvyxb0G6tXaqg4O4ylHofZlsv9LUOctDUdPXzzSWXo-5efS-4qOrULz2fz9tyWl7wyBdgRL9jY4kEdsAltXa6SHCCbAy_Acvx_fDQV4v2eZm_CzmbLU_1VReVQ9peZErrOJb49qT7k7JGzC-fTig8zv19bFQSUAeSY4tZydF-cxrYCQ1g2KMbjQWvje9n7eS57gQcjSdkwUa4DH1Cz9jldRZuqkMWwHKa6xZxK-QuKXxQrZ3wVw-32lvLzpaxFb/339/dpyiP4MdTBaoAPsMyZvj_g/h1/6PRxXFacjhApKdgGC0kudl1nNF999tLq7xe9_u_eziI) Throughout this pandemic, Trump has delegitimized voices of dissent and promised us COVID was going away. Too many Americans have died for that to work any longer, and those who’ve lost loved ones are making their fury heard.

That makes our job easy: **_let them speak their truth, then elevate their voices._**

**[Late last month, an American called out the Trump Administration on its deception — and tragically, they spoke from their experience.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/ynE08DlHKiF7jjkgKamTiQj7yFPx_n08ilREKuUsPeMDrGrtSkKm1S__9kBpBW00PKg3ibKaBXJCLjBpbQ-FfAtnkiAOpCf0TcxQz6YFpCx44Mx9DDARCYcj3B7xxK9avcD3TTDocxEkYKc4WI28WZwhhLPG7u9r6V5QTAFLHMjBCZOrcFoKGJjZG13cVjCINGqo2vsh7BqrzKx7zAj_RNqu4TE6scwDMERvLd1MlhCA_h24dUdry_BEzFuZ6C0Hkr1_0asz_0tE_p2sMaffKOxiADWvW2ETlYJ9ZTkrZpJl2yv7wX_uvsk_8mEIt3nOl0z2nBKLFYDSlppBRSQO7ai9adM9mU_gKFtIcAFC5rM/339/dpyiP4MdTBaoAPsMyZvj_g/h2/CjFg1Vj9UtI260Dw7dg-W4gRPnqOoWr9oQBOUJa7eio)**

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/ynE08DlHKiF7jjkgKamTiQj7yFPx_n08ilREKuUsPeMDrGrtSkKm1S__9kBpBW00PKg3ibKaBXJCLjBpbQ-FfCeeNbVTpNiDv-UbiKiWoTMvG_5tZup5wRLp83kg4rGe9m3bTxGfJoZgz5pQijKXIJPV5U3ZqnLxm8wtSaX7z5z_LTUsSwAZa8-OJV9Q8iNhzLBeFKd8TJFXr9DWSxe24k4VVJMJkYoAjtF9YEkxtq5JI95YE6ymjXDTUYxQJQb8DZ9zOJFD8ti9Wd4bETl7SnHmxbZ0-ySpCLfgt7Eou8fJx7hZ_G_W8jxu03YlNJXPNHRaDcPT0s0yw4pJc8gjoa7y4xMk-9kHKOSRvOoH_sw/339/dpyiP4MdTBaoAPsMyZvj_g/h3/CGb2mx40EpZ9v0xMjukjBVks85fvHTUI3JV9wVzSfOg) **[Trump’s base is losing faith as they watch their loved ones lose their lives. Share this post with your network so they can hear a real story that Trump can’t label “Fake News.”](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/ynE08DlHKiF7jjkgKamTiQj7yFPx_n08ilREKuUsPeMDrGrtSkKm1S__9kBpBW00PKg3ibKaBXJCLjBpbQ-FfPElpNW9ur1zZ55_J19ewrWvkL58-lenq2G7teFkiS__yMM6w032SJ8fg2eJaMcs_oQCGkXKtnVldpMkqvdeFYRFRdgA1lhAu-WiUnorafjruKGNlw6SfRkiJXikCpsg5ZSgnEX48Cm-XOM4GTHoao08rFQY87l1MzFx7IFgKcOSVuPf-9SxgJw4YT1caINUOCSxX03rE1dQx26m7oODuZ5yYtEoRWkpXVCaVey0lyXkJnbP5BXHPT0wcbII9Jvd_kt-D4e46w4DBwce77BKLuE/339/dpyiP4MdTBaoAPsMyZvj_g/h4/GCttuAwJ9l7FLRrq7CvwWb7WvjPoBFKajOpAFJ21MmU)**

P.S. Too many Americans have died for that to work any longer, and those who’ve lost loved ones are making their fury heard. That makes our job easy: let them speak their truth, then elevate their voices. The Defeat Disinfo Team P.S. Trump will protect his second term before he protects American lives, If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Defeat Disinfo, please .

We couldn’t have made it this far without you! \- Brett Anders Campaign Manager = | | | | = Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney. He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. = | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: This Fall, Get the Children Back in School
body:
All policy considerations for the coming school year should start with a goal of having students physically present in school | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=21df4b9252&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **This Fall, Get the Children Back in School**

“The American Academy of Pediatrics [AAP] has released a needed opinion that is strongly in favor of getting children back to school this fall,” the _Washington Examiner_ editorial board writes.

“The AAP strongly advocates that all policy considerations for the coming school year should start with a goal of having students physically present in school,” a statement from the group reads. President Trump is hosting a National Dialogue on Safely Reopening America’s Schools event at the White House today.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c426e385cc&e=3ee4985eea)

**WATCH LIVE at 12:15 p.m. ET** : [Safely Reopening America’s Schools](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4efc01343d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| On Sunday night, the Mayor of Atlanta "issued a full-throated call for citizens to stop ‘shooting each other up on our streets,’ after an 8-year-old girl was shot and killed on the Fourth of July,” Gregg Re writes. “You can't blame this on police officers,” Mayor Keisha Lance Bottoms said. Last month, President Trump offered federal help for any states and cities needing to quell violence and restore order to their streets. Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e9ee9972c7&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “At the direction of President Donald Trump, USDA built from the ground up an innovative new program called the Farmers to Families Food Box. This $3 billion program is supporting America’s farmers and producers by partnering with distributors to buy food that would otherwise go uneaten and distribute it to families and people who need food,” Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue writes in [_The Detroit News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=688ce2b77b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump just suspended nearly all guest-worker programs for the rest of the year. This historic executive order will open up more than 500,000 jobs to Americans—and it’ll disproportionately help Black citizens. These reforms aren’t mere rhetoric. They’re tangible proof that Donald Trump believes Black workers matter,” writes Tom Broadwater, an advocate for minority and other workers, in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4eba15e291&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e6cb5a191d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af8b2374bc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=62e2784728)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

subject: this race is getting national attention, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this: Sri and our campaign were just featured on CNN as one of the must-watch elections for this year.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18167484/219372746/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.07_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjMyYmExMy05M2MwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1nd3oQg_ODZZsRNT0huVeBnW1Ubl9efMBEivQ9mC2Ak=)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18167485/219372747/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjMyYmExMy05M2MwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1nd3oQg_ODZZsRNT0huVeBnW1Ubl9efMBEivQ9mC2Ak=&emci=5a38c4dc-87c0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=6b32ba13-93c0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Friend --

I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this: _Sri and our campaign were just featured on CNN as one of the must-watch elections for this year._
|
** CNN **
“Republicans are not looking for a broad coalition, they are focusing on a very small but intense coalition and they are leaving out the suburbs.’”

**-Sri Preston Kulkarni**

---
**This is yet another indicator that national outlets all across this country are recognizing that candidates like Sri have a clear path to victory -- and they’re paying attention.**
[**Donate now to help us build on this momentum and send Sri to Congress!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18167486/219372748/-2141433825?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.07_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjMyYmExMy05M2MwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1nd3oQg_ODZZsRNT0huVeBnW1Ubl9efMBEivQ9mC2Ak=) [Donate Now ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18167487/219372749/-2141433825?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.07_AC_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjMyYmExMy05M2MwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1nd3oQg_ODZZsRNT0huVeBnW1Ubl9efMBEivQ9mC2Ak=)
---

We have a shot at expanding our House majority and bringing real leadership to Congress by building strong coalitions and fighting for what matters.

But right now, there is a crisis of leadership in this country, and in our district. Too many of our trusted leaders are ignoring facts and favoring sensationalism. _**Even in our race, one of our Republican opponents is rejecting medical advice and telling people they don’t need to wear masks!**_

**“This government MANDATE from Harris County is _unnecessary_ , _unconstitutional_ , and _unAmerican_.”**

July 7, 2020
Contact: Press@johnkasich.com
**Gov. John Kasich: It's Time for Republican Leaders to Stop Being Afraid of Trump**
Gov. John Kasich spoke with CNN's Kate Bolduan and Erin Burnett on Monday, July 6th about President Trump's divisive rhetoric over the holiday weekend and the current state of the Republican Party. Find links below to the interviews and several clips.

Also, an excerpt below from a recent interview with the Washington Post's Robert Costa & Philip Rucker.
|

**From the[Washington Post](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=37165e4b6e1244bda25ef3c18339f1ee&_e=GVyspxXzanE_9Zs6CmyjvcoisQzqSIaRvdlGpvpXyvwfwNaYW9ItL-o27l0tMQXiZHHeuW-oDWkLporIHb-SJn5q1wqZswGDkdEamAIC7IGEGtBZo5knE5Ig7ilYyT0BmzKNumQxXO3_gBUteHxn5MoYWo4ALjIVJs5j8Vw7Nm6zd6c_tRagW_1LXvvtFd9mFYKQ7zwSJSkGLDTqp4fBA9Mi1BzknwREyZsO7AtC-eZFcc9i8HpukHtvbmgnuAKVnq1hcUq5E9-kek4ET7s0PiJCP_KuKy3kTsU0XWV5HAGJVzHHB9CmrpQPy5Fn0X0XiuYbUhn-MfYjie25knK3QeY9pqergqEB7d-uHHBqzZmqKdGN8EJUWopkM4XvYB-zVXAGSkDZp2XotzFSzxEZpWKwyjY781RbCTJAUNOVf74%3D):**

_"Former Ohio governor John Kasich, a Republican who ran against Trump in 2016, said the GOP’s muted and scattered response to the president on race this week underscores how the party is “in decline” and has become a vessel for Trumpism — even as polls show Trump losing ground among seniors and white evangelicals and trailing Biden in every key battleground state._

_“They coddled this guy the whole time and now it’s like some rats are jumping off of the sinking ship. It’s just a little late,” Kasich said. “It’s left this nation with a crescendo of hate not only between politicians but between citizens. . . . It started with Charlottesville and people remained silent then, and we find ourselves in this position now.”_

_Kasich added, “I’m glad to see some of these Republicans moving the other way but it reminds me of Vichy France where they said, ‘Well, I never had anything to do with that,’ ” a reference to the French government that continued during Nazi occupation in the 1940s."_

clean_body: Interview Topics: President Trump's divisive rhetoric over the holiday weekend and the current state of the Republican Party. | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE July 7, 2020 Contact: Press@johnkasich.com Gov. John Kasich: It's Time for Republican Leaders to Stop Being Afraid of Trump Gov. John Kasich spoke with CNN's Kate Bolduan and Erin Burnett on Monday, July 6th about President Trump's divisive rhetoric over the holiday weekend and the current state of the Republican Party. Find links below to the interviews and several clips. Also, an excerpt below from a recent interview with the Washington Post's Robert Costa & Philip Rucker. | Watch Full Interviews: - | From the: "Former Ohio governor John Kasich, a Republican who ran against Trump in 2016, said the GOP’s muted and scattered response to the president on race this week underscores how the party is “in decline” and has become a vessel for Trumpism — even as polls show Trump losing ground among seniors and white evangelicals and trailing Biden in every key battleground state. “They coddled this guy the whole time and now it’s like some rats are jumping off of the sinking ship. It’s just a little late,” Kasich said. “It’s left this nation with a crescendo of hate not only between politicians but between citizens. . . . It started with Charlottesville and people remained silent then, and we find ourselves in this position now.” Kasich added, “I’m glad to see some of these Republicans moving the other way but it reminds me of Vichy France where they said, ‘Well, I never had anything to do with that,’ ” a reference to the French government that continued during Nazi occupation in the 1940s." | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.www.JohnKasich.com

subject: Mount Trumpmore

body:
Bill Hagerty's tweet took it to the next level.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa134/18d6a294/4c9b0fd4/26d7f3c5/3969542825/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | | [](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa134/18d6a294/4c9b0fd4/26d7f3c2/3969542825/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200707?refcode=jme200707_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
On Fourth of July, our opponent Bill Hagerty suggested elevating Donald Trump's likeness to join George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, Theodore Roosevelt and Abraham Lincoln on Mount Rushmore.
[_**CHIP IN TO FIGHT BACK ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa134/18d6a294/4c9b0fd4/26d7f3c2/3969542825/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200707?refcode=jme200707_m_other&refcode2=107423")
A record making Tennessee the leader in rural hospital closures, ignoring the opioid epidemic, starting a trade war that hurt our state's economy more than any other -- and has failed to contain COVID-19 -- is not one to lionize.
[_**Yet Hagerty cheers every failure in a dangerous policy agenda that hurts Tennessee.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa134/18d6a294/4c9b0fd4/26d7f3c2/3969542825/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200707?refcode=jme200707_m_other&refcode2=107423")
Hagerty is not running to serve Tennessee -- he's running to rubber-stamp whatever he's told to in the Senate and **_he 's willing to put Trump's face on Mount Rushmore to get there._**
[_**Tennessee can 't afford another rubber-stamp joining Marsha Blackburn in the Senate. One is bad enough. Help us fight back today ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa134/18d6a294/4c9b0fd4/26d7f3c2/3969542825/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200707?refcode=jme200707_m_other&refcode2=107423")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa134/18d6a294/4c9b0fd4/26d7f3c3/3969542825/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDciLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200707?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme200707_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate $25](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa134/18d6a294/4c9b0fd4/26d7f3c0/3969542825/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDciLCJlM3NnWVhOck1pQjlmUT09IjoiMjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200707?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jme200707_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa134/18d6a294/4c9b0fd4/26d7f3c1/3969542825/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDciLCJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200707?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jme200707_m_&refcode2=107423")
---
| | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa134/18d6a294/4c9b0fd4/26d7f3c2/3969542825/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200707?refcode=jme200707_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
It's not any one senator's job to rubber stamp any president or party leader's agenda. When I joined the U.S. Army -- and many times since -- I swore an oath to protect and defend the Constitution. Senators swear an oath to the Constitution, and their mission is to serve all their constituents. That's the type of senator I will be. That's not Bill Hagerty
[_**I 'm in this fight for Tennesseans -- not Washington politicians or their agendas. If you are able, chip in today.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa134/18d6a294/4c9b0fd4/26d7f3c2/3969542825/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MDciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200707?refcode=jme200707_m_other&refcode2=107423")
In service,
James

subject: This candidate perfectly represents our values
body:
Sharlett is a powerhouse who has worked in Congress, for the Washington State Senate and for the Department of Ecology. | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c2fdd6f9c0&e=66979298f9)
---
| | | _You and Sharlett will secure a livable future. _
---
|
### **We are proud to endorse, climate champion, Sharlett Mena for WA State Representative for Legislative District 29.**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c8c38fe17c&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| _"I am honored to stand with Future Generations PAC for a prosperous and abundant future with salmon and orca. A future that honors treaty rights, confronts historical racism, and ensures a healthy environment for generations to come. Your partnership energizes me to work even harder." - Sharlett Mena_
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ac621d3059&e=66979298f9)
---
| [JOIN ONE OF OUR TEXTING PARTIES!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=71d95d846e&e=66979298f9 "JOIN ONE OF OUR TEXTING PARTIES!")
---
| [RSVP FACEBOOK EVENT](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=305954a70a&e=66979298f9 "RSVP FACEBOOK EVENT")
---
|
---
|
####
ABOUT SHARLETT MENA

Sharlett is a powerhouse who has worked in Congress, for the Washington State Senate and for the Department of Ecology. Each step of the way she has prioritized the protection of our communities and our environment. She comes from a farm working family and understands the importance of standing with marginalized communities for a just and livable future.

#### HER PLATFORM

Sharlett is going to fight to protect people during budget cuts coming from COVID 19 #PeopleFirst, fight like hell to secure a livable planet for future generations #ForTheFuture and work to end racism in our policing system #BlackLivesMatter.
---
|
---
| | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, we must focus on phone and text banking to get Sharlett's message to her district.**[ Will you invest today for seven generations into the future?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7fad3ea7c4&e=66979298f9)**
---
| [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ef93da1b7f&e=66979298f9)
---
| Join us this Monday July 13th at 5:30pm PST to reach out to voters via text message and let them know that Sharlett Mena is the candidate to vote for in the 29th LD. RSVP Here: [www.FutureGenerations.Earth/Sharlett](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=39b75193ba&e=66979298f9)

We will be meeting at 5:30pm on Zoom (we'll send you the Zoom link via email once you RSVP), having a 10 minute meet and greet with the amazing candidate, and then each send 1,000 texts out to voters.
---
| [JOIN THE TEXTING PARTY FOR SHARLETT](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=686bc3e31b&e=66979298f9 "JOIN THE TEXTING PARTY FOR SHARLETT")
---
|
---
|
### MEET OUR FG CAMPAIGNER: CHIARA D'ANGELO
---
| |
---
As the National Campaigns Director I am wholeheartedly committed to serving as an ally to my Indigenous leadership and ensuring that all of our candidates get the support they deserve. I am honored to serve in this role and hope you will join me in showing up for the inspiring candidates our PAC is supporting.

Chiara D'Angelo
National Campaigns Director
[Chiara](mailto:Chiara@futuregenerations.earth)[@FutureGenerations.Earth](mailto:Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth)

name: Tina Smith
subject: This is a long email, but it’s important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
My friend, I can’t even count the number of times folks have told me about not being able to pay for their health insurance. Or not being able to afford putting food on the table or paying their kid’s college tuition. Especially during these challenging times. Even though my name is on the ballot this year, this race is not about me. It’s about folks like you. It’s about creating a future where no one lives in fear of going to the doctor because they can’t afford another unexpected bill. A future where no one worries about the cost of going to college because it would saddle them with debt. No one. Look, I hate sending emails like these that ask you to pitch in at such a difficult time for so many, I really do. I know how hard you work for every dollar in your pocket. But I want you to know that every time I ask for your help, it’s because we need every penny we can muster to build the kind of grassroots campaign that can knock out the wealthy donors and corporations trying to swing this election and stack the deck against everyday Americans. **That’s why I have to do the thing I hate and ask you to donate today. If we win our race, I promise you will continue to have a Senator working her heart out in Washington and fighting for everyone who needs a hand. Chip in toward our weekly fundraising goal right here:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18168373/219392200/-1719553787?refcode=tsm-em-200707&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjE3NzI3MC05YmMwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B3u0DnQKcjF7XuR-ZcIf55_x0jrHhb5VS_ghN4fNwdw=)

Every single gift matters, no matter how large or small — and every penny you can spare is an investment in the work we’re doing to create a better future for all of us.
I hope you know how grateful I am to have you by my side in this campaign. I wouldn’t be here without your support every step of the way. Thank you.
— Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

clean_body: | My friend, I can’t even count the number of times folks have told me about not being able to pay for their health insurance. Or not being able to afford putting food on the table or paying their kid’s college tuition. Especially during these challenging times. Even though my name is on the ballot this year, this race is not about me. It’s about folks like you. It’s about creating a future where no one lives in fear of going to the doctor because they can’t afford another unexpected bill. A future where no one worries about the cost of going to college because it would saddle them with debt. No one. Look, I hate sending emails like these that ask you to pitch in at such a difficult time for so many, I really do. I know how hard you work for every dollar in your pocket. But I want you to know that every time I ask for your help, it’s because we need every penny we can muster to build the kind of grassroots campaign that can knock out the wealthy donors and corporations trying to swing this election and stack the deck against everyday Americans. That’s why I have to do the thing I hate and ask you to donate today. If we win our race, I promise you will continue to have a Senator working her heart out in Washington and fighting for everyone who needs a hand. Chip in toward our weekly fundraising goal right here: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Every single gift matters, no matter how large or small — and every penny you can spare is an investment in the work we’re doing to create a better future for all of us. I hope you know how grateful I am to have you by my side in this campaign. I wouldn’t be here without your support every step of the way. Thank you. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota To receive exclusive campaign updates, text TINA to 30311 and subscribe to our texts! Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Mississippi Republicans Bring Tax Increases
body:
Mississippi Republicans Bring Tax Increases
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/HgOlKpYQXVTV7aOr6vA1K9rpNAJO9gc698DN-l2Lj3CjjpdtOdiwsK7myanrB0nOsig78GwkxjM2onW8BI07sAlhAPxyAHzW7-XlGjO_iR23fazohDsmiDywvOdl3X9eap_pI9ucGpAO1HpFmWTP_1qg1lrxhF76wmocGFLAGtt1tNbpcO8uXWYHx9USUc-xhehhcViEeICJgiQU8oQizcpYyLjhOBzZoCb-GAE0xksnF8FW7D3SY2T2BUgyjiS9kdM)
---
| | | |
---
**Mississippi Republicans Bring Tax Increases**
| |
---
| | | |
---
Unemployment in Mississippi and the nation is at an all-time high due to the Corona virus and the shut down of the world economy. Businesses have been forced to shut their doors creating long term economic disaster for business owners and employees. The result of this economic disaster is a sharp decrease in personal income; people are struggling to pay their bills and feed their families. So what is the Mississippi legislature’s answer to this dilemma? **Raise Taxes!** Republicans have always heralded themselves as the political party that you can trust to fight for smaller government and lower taxes. Republicans campaign on reducing the tax burden government places on citizens and decreasing the amount of your hard-earned money taken from you. On the Mississippi Republican Party’s website it states, Mississippi Republicans support the reduction of the tax burden on our citizens. We believe our tax burden is too high, our tax code is too complicated, and our tax system is inefficient. We believe in the reduction of taxes to empower taxpayers, to create a more competitive environment for job creation, to incentivize work, entrepreneurship, and investment, and to prevent the excessive growth of government. The majority of the members in the Mississippi legislature claim to be Republicans and campaign on the Republican platform, so why did the legislature pass multiple bills that increase taxes on the citizens of Mississippi? Here are the tax increases coming to the people of Mississippi, thanks to your Republican legislature. **HB379** – Mississippi Marketplace Facilitator Act of 2020 This bill authorizes the state to tax, regulate and audit online “marketplace facilitators” (companies that facilitate the online buying and selling of personal property like Etsy or Amazon Marketplace). It also includes a provision that allows this tax to be passed on to those who purchase items through the facilitator. This bill is an attempt by the state government to become involved in the growing online market of personal property. This state involvement in these online marketplaces will surely raise costs in this marketplace and make these online facilitators less inclined to operate with potential sellers/buyers **HB1159** – City of Florence, extends tax on bars and restaurants **HB1425** – City of Fulton, extends tax on hotel/motel rooms **HB1606** – City of Water Valley, authorizes a tax on restaurants **HB1661** – City of Pearl, extends tax on hotels/motels and restaurants **SB2119** – City of Pontotoc, extends tax on hotels/motels and restaurants **SB2183** – City of Houston, extends tax on hotels/motels and restaurants **SB2905** – City of Hattiesburg, extends tax on hotels/motels and restaurants **SB2908** – City of West Point, extends tax on hotels/motels and restaurants **SB2924** – City of Winona, extends tax on restaurants **What is the answer?** Are politicians telling you the truth when they campaign as Republicans? If they campaign as Republicans why don’t they legislate by the Republican platform and beliefs? I campaign as a Republican because I believe that lower taxes and smaller government is the only way our state will be prosperous. I believe in the Republican platform and I vote as a legislator on those ideals and principles. It’s time the Republican politicians return to the ideals and beliefs they were elected to uphold or you send them home.
| |
---
| | **I need you with me** Click the link below to join me in the fight for lower taxes and better government. I want to be your voice.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Donald Trump just reserved $90 million worth of ads in key battleground states for this fall. |
---
Hey, Peter, it's Elana, Joe Biden's Online Fundraising Director.

Trust me, I know the emails we send pile up, but I do hope you'll give me a chance to explain why we keep emailing and remind you that these fundraising emails are going to help us defeat Donald Trump. [**Then, I hope you 'll chip in $5.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.03_B2_trumpadbuy_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.03_B2_trumpadbuy_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

Donald Trump just reserved more than $90 million worth of ads in key battleground states for this fall. Peter -- that's huge.

It's hard to believe, but we're entering the final stretch of this election. We need to make sure we can get our own ads up in response to this. So, Peter, that's why I'm coming to you.
