[**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bee1/1cd0ac28/889e17c5/357ce107/2494825522/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bee1/1cd0ac28/889e17c5/357ce106/2494825522/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). | [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bee1/1cd0ac28/889e17c5/357ce102/2494825522/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bee1/1cd0ac28/889e17c5/357ce105/2494825522/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bee1/1cd0ac28/889e17c5/357ce100/2494825522/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

body: https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=207A327A1A4180 Friends, The headlines speak for themselves- https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=207A327A1A4181 Think this explosion in violent crime is just in New York thanks to mayor Bill de Blasio? Think again. Chicago Sun-Times: 79 shot, 15 fatally, over Fourth of July weekend in Chicago Fox: Fourth of July weekend marked by violence as girl, 7, among dead in Chicago, cities see deadly shootings Atlanta CBS: Multiple people shot, 5 dead, following deadly holiday weekend Fox: Atlanta mayor calls for citizens to stop 'shooting each other' after murder of 8 year-old near BLM protest site ABC: 4 killed, 22 people injured in 6 different shootings on 4th of July weekend, police say Philadelphia ABC: A violent holiday weekend in Philadelphia; 31 total shot since Friday, at least 7 dead Baltimore The Sun: Nine shot, one fatally, in Baltimore over holiday weekend CBS: 3-Year-Old Girl, Pregnant Mother Killed In SW Baltimore Shooting, Family Says Los Angeles KTLA: LAPD seeks tips after 19-year-old dies in drive-by shooting CBS: Suspect At Large After Shooting In Unincorporated Area Of LA Leaves 1 Dead, 1 Wounded Maybe you're thinking this was just an unusually violent weekend? Wrong. 6/15 - Daily News: Murders continue to surge in NYC with 38 killings in the last four weeks 6/16 - CNN: New York City crime stats show spike in burglaries and murders so far this year 6/19 - The Post: Shootings surge in NYC amid disbanding of NYPD's plainclothes anti-crime unit 6/27 - ABC: 18 shot in 24 hours as spike in gun violence in NYC continues 6/28 - CBS: Multiple Weekend Shootings Continue Citywide Spike In Gun Violence 7/5 - NBC: NYC Shootings Doubled for Third Straight Week; Hundreds Injured in Gun Violence Spike 7/6 - ABC: 15-year-old shot in East Harlem as surge in violence continues That's it. No ask. Just go hug your loved ones, pray for an end to violence, and go vote in November for leaders who will stand up to the radicals who are defunding the police in cities across our country. Sincerely, Nicole Malliotakis P.S. If you want to show your support to keep our police funded, join me at one of the 3 events happening this week https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=207A327A1A4183 https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=207A327A1A4184 https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=207A327A1A4185 https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=207A327A1A4186 PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL) _________________ Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Unsubscribe: http://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/proc.php?nl=1&c=207&m=327&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&act=unsub Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306, United States

name: Amanda
subject: Suncoast Brotherhood Endorses Amanda Makki for Congress
body:
“Pinellas has a very active biker community that has been lacking representation for some time. After meeting Amanda, it is clear that she is a real fighter for American values and will be our voice in Congress.”

- TJ Sutton, President of Suncoast Brotherhood, Pinellas Chapter

"I am humbled to receive the full endorsement of the Suncoast Brotherhood Pinellas Chapter. Along with our Bikers for Makki coalition headed by Pinellas business owners Bert King and Keith Overton, we are ensuring we have a strong understanding of legislation that affects bikers on the federal level. I am ready to get to work and be their advocate."

Amanda

Amanda Makki for Congress

Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th District

727-735-5921

For Online Contributions: www.amandamakki.com

For Contributions via Mail, please send to:

Amanda Makki for Congress

PO Box 47483

St. Petersburg, FL 33743

-=-=-

Amanda Makki for Congress - FL 33743, United States

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving emails: https://makki.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe

-=-=-

subject: Rita Review [July Edition]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/I0AwBTW1kGMTpc_RXkjivRXJo0W3519UB_nnbNmr2Ic=/QTsOhpdCho5XVfW_USEHBi3rW-Tl4-_iuSrdoKgz7rc=?refcode=200707-email) _Welcome to the July edition of The Rita Review! June was as busy as ever as we balanced working on the farm and the campaign! And with just 4 MONTHS until Election Day, it 's only going to be busier from here on out._ **" Rita Hart's First Bill in The House Would Reform it"** Rita is going to work hard for IA-02 and that starts with fighting corruption in Washington. In a recent article, she said: "To make progress on the issues we all care about - health care, jobs, justice, public safety, and education, we need to fundamentally change how Washington does business so every voice can be heard," "Too often in Washington, the loudest and most powerful voices drown out the rest of us" because special interests use money and influence to stymie progress," [Learn more about Rita's fight against corruption here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/I0AwBTW1kGMTpc_RXkjivRXJo0W3519UB_nnbNmr2Ic=/yQYmap-9Ql7oK5PerhIy67fLLcCxlkyQjtm5OdyFJik=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/I0AwBTW1kGMTpc_RXkjivRXJo0W3519UB_nnbNmr2Ic=/yQYmap-9Ql7oK5PerhIy67fLLcCxlkyQjtm5OdyFJik=?fbclid=IwAR2X_9U1zs0bmsnW9fyt3fmFuMblpl8QF65MgHLvrrOz2f5C0zDiJwukbpg) **Human Rights Campaign Endorsement** An exciting endorsement from the Human Rights Campaign came in early this month. Iowa has a proud history in the fight for equality. Rita is prepared to work to pass the Equality Act and ensure equal rights for all Iowans. **On to the General Election!** After a record-breaking Primary Election with more voter turnout than usual thanks to a push to expand access to mail-in voting, Rita is moving on to the General Election! Things will only get harder from here as experts still call this district a total tossup, but we're up to the challenge. Rita's looking forward to fighting for all of us here in IA-02 and protecting the programs that we rely on like Medicaid and Medicare from an opponent who supports voucherization and privatization. **Celebrating Paul!** A few weeks ago was Father's day, and Rita had to show some love for her husband Paul, a kind, supportive and loving father and grandfather to their children and grandchildren. Here's to all the great dads out there who love their children and grandchildren unconditionally. ‬‬ **Having health insurance is crucial in a pandemic** Like so many Iowans, quality health care is personal to Rita. Her mother suffered from chronic health conditions and her nephew requires home care. We need to protect and strengthen the ACA, not overturn it. It's time for DC politicians to get to work to lower the cost of prescription drugs by letting Medicare negotiate better prices and provide new incentives to increase the number of rural health care providers. [Learn more about what Rita believes here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/I0AwBTW1kGMTpc_RXkjivRXJo0W3519UB_nnbNmr2Ic=/OWVrXVasxalhFQ1G-abTrckFgH6AHpNjgHCLup0v2Do=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/I0AwBTW1kGMTpc_RXkjivRXJo0W3519UB_nnbNmr2Ic=/OWVrXVasxalhFQ1G-abTrckFgH6AHpNjgHCLup0v2Do=?fbclid=IwAR1A1oZDQH11nk7zozOS6qqTctvS5VvjheTdC27Vat7MegjU2G9OdjsYIZE) **Hart Listens!** Sarah Hogan shared her thoughts on Rita through this great Letter to the Editor! "If she spots somebody she has not met yet, she will walk across the room or a front yard and introduce herself, saying, 'Hello, I'm Rita Hart. What issues are important to you?'" If you would like to help Rita win by writing a Letter to the Editor, reply to this email and someone from our team will be in touch! [Read the letter here!](https://act.myngp.com/el/I0AwBTW1kGMTpc_RXkjivRXJo0W3519UB_nnbNmr2Ic=/QgTv4X64sGbFaJ_UrwQp87TLdFVn8qzw6Fo_uQrGw4Q=) **New Website Launch** To keep up with her everchanging campaign, Rita reworked her website to offer more resources and information on her campaign. [Check it out and share it with your friends here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/I0AwBTW1kGMTpc_RXkjivRXJo0W3519UB_nnbNmr2Ic=/3LN8rwoJobH9LExiXq03bGApwbmvJTfgPHbk7Altg0k=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/I0AwBTW1kGMTpc_RXkjivRXJo0W3519UB_nnbNmr2Ic=/3LN8rwoJobH9LExiXq03bGApwbmvJTfgPHbk7Altg0k=) _\--Team Rita_ | ____**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/I0AwBTW1kGMTpc_RXkjivRXJo0W3519UB_nnbNmr2Ic=/QTsOhpdCho5XVfW_USEHBi3rW-Tl4-_iuSrdoKgz7rc=?refcode=200707-email)**____
---

body:
Democrats have Kansas in their sights for ONE reason | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d211bc33a8&e=1050d051da)
---
| Straight from the headlines. The Democrat opponent in the Kansas 2nd congressional district race, Topeka Mayor Michelle De La Isa, will be _**getting added help from the National Democrats**_ because they believe it's a district that is ripe for takeover for **ONE** reason..._**Steve is a candidate they don't believe can win**_.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e87449baa9&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| This news is not a surprise. [It was reported in January](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8c7bcaef86&e=1050d051da) that the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee had targeted the seat for takeover because of weakness in Watkins as a candidate.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=657df07d63&e=1050d051da)

| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=7b60eabd69&e=1050d051da)
---
| This is exactly why we are in this race. Jake LaTurner is a conservative who not only has the integrity to go to Washington, D.C. and represent us well, but he also has what it takes to win against the Democrat opponent. No alleged scandals, no felony investigations pending, just a solid conservative record and the hardest working team out there.
---
| [Help send a trusted Conservative to Congress](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=506f546f11&e=1050d051da "Help send a trusted Conservative to Congress")

---
|
---
| Join us in showing the Democrats they are up against the strongest opponent Kansas 2nd congressional district has to offer, and they will NOT be taking this seat for Nancy Pelosi!

We sincerely appreciate your support!

Yours in the fight,

Kansans for LaTurner

name: Team Sri
subject: [You're Invited] Katy 4 Justice Town Hall with Sri on Wednesday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.07_AC_b1_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.07_AC_b1_all&amount=25]
Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.
Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.
Friend --
A few weeks ago, Sri hosted a Youth Town Hall featuring some of the inspiring young activists that are working to make our community—and our country—a better place. Our team enjoyed hearing from the young people of TX-22 so much that we’re hosting another Youth Town Hall with members of Katy 4 Justice this Wednesday at 6pm! Katy 4 Justice is a youth organization that is focused on advocating for racial equality in our community.
This week’s Youth Town Hall will be focused on what drives the youth activists in our area, how they advocate for change, and how we can fight alongside them. Additionally, this town hall will have a focus on the importance and role of intersectionality in progressive activism.
The town hall will be held this Wednesday, at 6pm CT.
CLICK HERE TO SIGN UP! [https://www.mobilize.us/sriforcongress/event/286232/]
The discussion will be led by these young leaders:
*
Erika
Alvarez:
a
student
activist
in
the
greater
Katy
area
and
part
of
the
Venezuelan
community.
*
Foyin
Dosunmu:
a
student
activist
in
the
greater
Katy
area
and
part
of
the
African
American
community.
*
Jeffrey
Jin:
a
student
activist
in
the
greater
Katy
area
and
part
of
the
Asian
and
LGBTQ+
community.
Excited to see you!
--Team Sri

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.07_AC_b1_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.07_AC_b1_all&amount=25]
Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.07_AC_b1_all&amount=25]
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com [https://sri2020.com/]
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Cory Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
From organizing for tenants' rights in Newark, to running for president on a mission of uniting our country around our highest ideals, to working to fix our broken criminal justice system, Cory Booker | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250c3/45c30650/1cf58cebf/66e853c7/4090845623/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
My friend Cory Booker has always been a powerful voice for justice and equality.

>From organizing for tenants' rights in Newark, to running for president on a mission of uniting our country around our highest ideals, to working to fix our broken criminal justice system, he's been a leader in the fight to build a better future.

Now, he's up for re-election to the United States Senate -- and now more than ever, we need to keep his voice in Washington.

**Today's his primary. I'm honored to support him, and I'd be very glad if we could give him a big boost of grassroots support today to show that we're fighting by his side.**

**[If you're able to, please split a contribution of $2 or whatever makes sense between Cory Booker's re-election campaign and mine. Your donation would help re-elect Cory, take back the Senate, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250c3/45c30650/1cf58cebf/66e853c6/4090845623/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWNiIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQwM0ZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzA3X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-cb?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT03F_EGR_END_E_20200707_V1S1_P")**

I'm honored to work with Cory Booker in the Senate, and I was grateful to hear his voice in the Democratic primary for president -- he made the primary stronger and more substantive.

And since ending his presidential campaign, he hasn't slowed down -- not one bit.

He's helped lead the charge to end police brutality, root out systemic racism, and protect Black lives. He's fought to put people first as we respond to this pandemic, including holding meatpacking companies accountable for endangering workers and jacking up prices.

As he always said during the primary, beating Donald Trump in 2020 is the floor, not the ceiling, of what we need to accomplish.

We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, hold onto our House majority, take back the Senate, and build a grassroots movement to make bold reforms in 2021 and beyond.

And that starts with re-electing Cory Booker.

**[Help make sure that Cory Booker can keep fighting for working families, and help elect Democrats all over the country, by making a donation to his re-election campaign and Warren Democrats today.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250c3/45c30650/1cf58cebf/66e853c6/4090845623/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWNiIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQwM0ZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzA3X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-cb?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT03F_EGR_END_E_20200707_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: From organizing for tenants' rights in Newark, to running for president on a mission of uniting our country around our highest ideals, to working to fix our broken criminal justice system, Cory Booker | | | "" My friend Cory Booker has always been a powerful voice for justice and equality. From organizing for tenants' rights in Newark, to running for president on a mission of uniting our country around our highest ideals, to working to fix our broken criminal justice system, he's been a leader in the fight to build a better future. Now, he's up for re-election to the United States Senate -- and now more than ever, we need to keep his voice in Washington. Today's his primary. I'm honored to support him, and I'd be very glad if we could give him a big boost of grassroots support today to show that we're fighting by his side. "" I'm honored to work with Cory Booker in the Senate, and I was grateful to hear his voice in the Democratic primary for president -- he made the primary stronger and more substantive. And since ending his presidential campaign, he hasn't slowed down -- not one bit. He's helped lead the charge to end police brutality, root out systemic racism, and protect Black lives. He's fought to put people first as we respond to this pandemic, including holding meatpacking companies accountable for endangering workers and jacking up prices. As he always said during the primary, beating Donald Trump in 2020 is the floor, not the ceiling, of what we need to accomplish. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, hold onto our House majority, take back the Senate, and build a grassroots movement to make bold reforms in 2021 and beyond. And that starts with re-electing Cory Booker. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Facebook Caught Colluding with Democrats
body:
Mark Zuckerberg appeared on CBS Morning News late last year, sat next to his wife and put on his best face to appear like a reasonable proponent of Freedom of Speech.
| | |
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-383096-902901-5080326-e2899ea2d8-d82352ca03) _“I don’t think that a private company should be censoring politicians or news.”_

\- Facebook CEO Mark Zuckerberg, 12/02/2019
That’s right, Mark Zuckerberg appeared on CBS Morning News late last year, sat next to his wife and put on his best face to appear like a reasonable proponent of Freedom of Speech.

As Twitter made the decision to ban political ads, Zuck stood by his decision to keep the political industry’s billion-dollar revenue stream and pledged not to ban political ads.

But just days ago, this happened to my Congressional campaign . . .

**ZUCKERBERG LIED! JUST LIKE HE LIED WHEN HE TESTIFIED IN FRONT OF CONGRESS!**

Just as my campaign staff is preparing for my primary next month, Facebook pulled the plug on my ability to reach Republican voters.

But thankfully, Facebook isn’t the only game in town.

[**Help me break the Facebook Factor and deploy our campaign ads across the Internet and TV.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-383096-902901-5080326-e2899ea2d8-d82352ca03)

By Friday, we need to raise $32,000 to fund our advertising budget and finish the production on two more ads.

[**Can you chip in $12 today?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-383096-902901-5080326-e2899ea2d8-d82352ca03)

That will help us reach 500 voters online.

[**If you can donate $48, that will cover the ENTIRE cost of airing our “Law and Order” ad one time on a local station.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-383096-902901-5080326-e2899ea2d8-d82352ca03)

While Democrats and the Leftist Media kicked and screamed about fake “Russia Collusion” for years **and even impeached our president** , these same Democrats are cheering as Silicon Valley billionaires interfere with our elections!

But I’m not surprised at all that I’m the ONLY FEDERAL CANDIDATE who is banned from running ads on Facebook.

Facebook, Twitter, Google, Amazon and others know that when I’m sworn into office, **I will bring the hammer down on their ongoing strategy to silence conservative voices**.

They made me the posterchild of Social Media Bias thinking I would just shrink away.

They thought I would fade away and give up the fight when they banned me from nearly every social media site.

They thought I would breakdown and give up my career as an investigative journalist when they killed my access to my own bank . . . to Paypal . . . to Venmo . . . and even stopped me from using Uber and Lyft.

They misjudged **me just like they’ve misjudged the entire Conservative Movement**.

We don’t scream, cry, riot or commit violent acts when we’re wronged.

**We patiently put in the work to peacefully CHANGE the system.**
And change is coming!

When I get to Congress, I’m going to CANCEL “CANCEL CULTURE”!

[**Are you in?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-383096-902901-5080326-e2899ea2d8-d82352ca03)

Help me win my way to Congress today [**by donating to support my campaign**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-383096-902901-5080326-e2899ea2d8-d82352ca03).

Thanks so much for taking the time to read this letter and for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. My Republican Primary is coming up on August 18th. It’s right around the corner. While I’ll be winning the primary, I want to send a clear message to these Leftists and have the biggest Republican turnout in the history of the district I share with President and Mrs. Trump. [**Help me reach more voters by donating today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-383096-902901-5080326-e2899ea2d8-d82352ca03)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-383096-902901-84585d41bbe610b-d82352ca03)

name: Rob Portman
subject: conservative judges alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
What is our Republican Senate majority’s greatest accomplishment? There’s a lot of choices to choose from... tax cuts for working families, new....... Peter, What is our Republican Senate majority’s greatest accomplishment?
There’s a lot of choices to choose from... tax cuts for working families, new incentives for companies to do business in America, the biggest pay raise ever for our military?
While all of these examples are crucially important, there is only one accomplishment that will last a lifetime... the confirmation of hundreds of conservative judges.
And Peter... just last week, the Senate confirmed President Trump’s TWO HUNDREDTH judge to the federal bench – a momentous feat.
It’s true, Peter, the conservative judges confirmed by the Senate and President Trump will serve as beacons of our conservative values in courtrooms all around the nation, for decades to come.
But with every great success comes a new challenge. The left has begun to use these judges as a rallying cry for their radical base. They’re raising money, recruiting volunteers, and taking to the streets to advocate for a future VOID of defenders of conservatism.
They want it to be a thing of the past.
That’s why I’m asking for your help – we need to act quickly if we’re going to protect the values these good judges are fighting to preserve. **[We need to counter the efforts of the far left... will you sign the petition and join my fight?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=c95a417d11ac40bebacc6c4d7275cd77&_e=U4p6VU9ssgt7X_mb-Fu7D7gA3wsadbrv_aQCeiFf4PofL7YYLXYIGg43kDba4hRLDh_OFm-UMLzA7sWyJiyaLsYjW_AWIXRV0Su4MrpVsJuTvJUxtW8sNfsCDbHYzIAmrJn6v2l2kVXQ7By5LJAQHPbHXlP4SkEdHoyeknz3TbAHToE8YysVxWimjzYxsvyitG83hmF_jXeg6zwxvx6-RFkF6g6MEdlLInHov6_-RsgAX2PmgPhcjoh3CkwPPttz5vDKJv6Q1Jilxiqt01Hfvg0skQgSlRTr1CYE7_B8cRkHjRNGehXnAL9OmRZWeaOV9skqXG6hj009XvYOjgLoLNmIwBYWavLODD6Lf-MJPcPY8NcROnnTpK-yGRnMVEvdLC31jAd6YW5iWf0DX8ljZJ-6lalakV9-6_wDPw8BueR9Zc9dypN6u7LimO7O26hs)** They want to restrict our speech and make on-demand abortion an absolute right. They want to grow the size of our government and give more power to politicians and bureaucrats.
Peter, Republicans in Congress are working hard to defend these conservative judges, but we need your help.
With the power of the grassroots, we can show the left that the American people REJECT their efforts to replace our conservative values. Will you SIGN THE PETITION to help make that statement and PROTECT conservative judges?

Peter, What is our Republican Senate majority’s greatest accomplishment? There’s a lot of choices to choose from... tax cuts for working families, new incentives for companies to do business in America, the biggest pay raise ever for our military? name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Crush COVID
body:
Your Rhode Island News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I hope you had a fun and safe Fourth of July weekend! I'll be back to my regularly scheduled press conferences tomorrow afternoon. Before that, I want to remind you how important it is to download the [Crush COVID app](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001go57K-LhTuqxTIJ-FqEVVGc-dB0J6xeqloMvNVo6b2TlfiNAFC4Kk050wFVa7Hj344tcZaOlC3nUgHB_rOe_YnII2zDe0t0aqM6qj0jn5uwD9GY1SAMaSri4yBAz0vcqRUpmSQMN5Owj_LQjE6SKTVmqpwZJRs9a&c=c8DpswttdeVAsQcv0NAmTzSO8RJweJmzKJFYiVzzaLfW4vHnj8SEHA==&ch=PxDIaJCT0LgGR3_ZKuMQ-X9iAzPGmiAp1GRg3m48lqgZ-DpGKci3PA==) in the [Apple App Store](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001go57K-LhTuqxTIJ-FqEVVGc-dB0J6xeqloMvNVo6b2TlfiNAFC4Kk62ijcfXIqAUch25KKWSIPbDlRSuICz5xiXw8e8eXSIx-yDCj3CvI_V3izRXyp4Sy1zLG-51eJQjqVLXQQdIWUPCc5a6tbHEo8CJ3Lu9jklC_0EZEIvBea88MUHNmCuV2t5KvwLstV3J0rRhwasNojOwUMY0WdtSLg==&c=c8DpswttdeVAsQcv0NAmTzSO8RJweJmzKJFYiVzzaLfW4vHnj8SEHA==&ch=PxDIaJCT0LgGR3_ZKuMQ-X9iAzPGmiAp1GRg3m48lqgZ-DpGKci3PA==) or [Google Play](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001go57K-LhTuqxTIJ-FqEVVGc-dB0J6xeqloMvNVo6b2TlfiNAFC4Kk62ijcfXIqAUxQbDUthfBbsk7rx9NvQfwZLD3sdPjYbQqfui2MbVe36iISfPmR_dZHLfrgwWPzjcqIkvTxHNSPwhgcP2VeHhB9Tw76Lq-88bsaWA62CGFPIlA_BRmNQPK004UsANTO0VCmfs-9YpecLTjUzjj0qs8Q==&c=c8DpswttdeVAsQcv0NAmTzSO8RJweJmzKJFYiVzzaLfW4vHnj8SEHA==&ch=PxDIaJCT0LgGR3_ZKuMQ-X9iAzPGmiAp1GRg3m48lqgZ-DpGKci3PA==) so that we can effectively track the spread of COVID-19 in Rhode Island.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001go57K-LhTuqxTIJ-FqEVVGc-dB0J6xeqloMvNVo6b2TlfiNAFC4Kk-2qvqNa7LzODOk9rwWcZPh_twZIS5HU2AKm-ism6WWLHC7RWZ_PpjN0qOzYm7zH_w6l0YCyHfR0nw1NgE6VSZ1fyhOCtlGGOS710eaR0zE7G6k5zRfFM55ijKycw4eH5ScMAcAa6ZqZDMXv4L3S_Sg=&c=c8DpswttdeVAsQcv0NAmTzSO8RJweJmzKJFYiVzzaLfW4vHnj8SEHA==&ch=PxDIaJCT0LgGR3_ZKuMQ-X9iAzPGmiAp1GRg3m48lqgZ-DpGKci3PA==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001go57K-LhTuqxTIJ-FqEVVGc-dB0J6xeqloMvNVo6b2TlfiNAFC4Kk-2qvqNa7LzODOk9rwWcZPh_twZIS5HU2AKm-ism6WWLHC7RWZ_PpjN0qOzYm7zH_w6l0YCyHfR0nw1NgE6VSZ1fyhOCtlGGOS710eaR0zE7G6k5zRfFM55ijKycw4eH5ScMAcAa6ZqZDMXv4L3S_Sg=&c=c8DpswttdeVAsQcv0NAmTzSO8RJweJmzKJFYiVzzaLfW4vHnj8SEHA==&ch=PxDIaJCT0LgGR3_ZKuMQ-X9iAzPGmiAp1GRg3m48lqgZ-DpGKci3PA==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| As a reminder, here's what Crush COVID can do:

* Resources: We know that those in quarantine and isolation may need help getting food delivered or finding a safe place to stay. Our veterans and seniors may need an extra hand. And all Rhode Islanders may need mental and behavioral health support during this crisis. This app can help by connecting you with the assistance you need to stay safe and healthy during this crisis.

* Information: CRUSH COVID RI will connect you to the latest COVID-19 news. You can watch our press conferences, learn more about our plans to reopen the economy and get the latest data and public health information about the virus.
* Testing: Rhode Island is leading the nation in per capita testing. If you ever need a test for yourself, CRUSH COVID RI lays out our testing options clearly so that you can find the option that fits your needs. We also connect you directly with our Self-Checker Tool to help you understand your personal risk and whether you should get tested.
* Symptom Checker: One of the main features of the app is our Symptom Checker. It's a quick, 10 second survey that asks you to self-report any symptoms you have. It then asks for your zip code so the Rhode Island Department of Health can see if there are any growing hotspots or if there are specific parts of the state where we need to expand access to testing.

* Location Diary: The app includes a completely optional location tracker. If you choose to use it, the app will create a map of the places you visit for 10 minutes or more. That data is stored on your phone only and automatically deletes after 20 days. It is only available to you--unless you get coronavirus and give specific consent to share your data with the Rhode Island Department of Health. If you choose to share it, your data will be stored anonymously and will only be connected to you by a case investigator at the Rhode Island Department of Health.

Downloading Crush COVID is--and will always be--completely optional. Even if you download it, no one is going to make you turn on the Location Diary feature. You can use the app without it and continue with your manual contact tracing journal. Even if you do use the Location Diary, no one is going to make you share it with the Department of Health if you get sick. These decisions are all up to you. If you don't have the app, that's OK. But you'll need to make sure you're regularly updating your manual contact journal.
Crush COVID RI was designed to make the contact tracing process less stressful for Rhode Islanders, and more accurate. We all have so much going on--it's easy to forget where we've been if we're not taking detailed notes every day. I hope that this can make your life a little bit easier during this time.
---
| We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001go57K-LhTuqxTIJ-FqEVVGc-dB0J6xeqloMvNVo6b2TlfiNAFC4Kk050wFVa7Hj3nkzqFdnHSHuOPYqNzC8q4msU79YMwxNUQxCIkc2W0XwRAKOiE-RToJ_mbkw03d7GDmSVC6yC-2qpOHPO8RqbyJUx0vMAaqV6saTvE7jKYO4P9OXpUwNeT48ndGp4Ic2cgnXZN2EliBgHI8lBPoUP23NBPSQXbX-58QhE_7FJahpaLpfjDgryLCcsNdYI0xhFiYFlh4Ab_SQKpfeUrNwx5pcWTLhE2q9ZSSQEHf_2OFsdZmvLbTb1jjh9m6tFgDnrN17oCaySQ6c=&c=c8DpswttdeVAsQcv0NAmTzSO8RJweJmzKJFYiVzzaLfW4vHnj8SEHA==&ch=PxDIaJCT0LgGR3_ZKuMQ-X9iAzPGmiAp1GRg3m48lqgZ-DpGKci3PA==).

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Inside today’s White House summit on reopening American schools
body:
In the weeks ahead, educators and government officials will be making important decisions about when to safely reopen America’s schools. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=31f7f11840&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 7, 2020
---
| | |
# **Inside today’s White House summit on reopening American schools**

**In the weeks ahead,** educators and government officials at the state and local level will be making important decisions about when to safely reopen America’s schools.

**“Our shared goal** should be to have students physically present in school this fall if at all possible,” the President of the American Academy of Pediatrics, Dr. Sally Goza, said at a White House summit today on Safely Reopening America’s Schools.

🎬 [Dr. Goza: Missing school has lasting effects on children](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cb8bdc211&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump** and his Administration know that schools are a crucial part of every American community. More than $13 billion from the President’s CARES Act is dedicated to helping schools navigate the extraordinary challenges presented by the Coronavirus pandemic.

**Today’s White House summit** brought together health and education officials from across government and society, including Dr. Deborah Birx, Health & Human Services Secretary Alex Azar, and Education Secretary Betsy DeVos. Panels featured state and local leaders, healthcare professionals, school administrators, teachers, and parents.

**First Lady Melania Trump** —whose Be Best initiative focuses on improving child well-being—and Second Lady Karen Pence, a teacher, both joined the summit, as did President Trump and Vice President Pence.

🎬 [First Lady: Students “missing more than just time in the classroom”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=761f028277&e=3ee4985eea)

**The American Academy of Pediatrics** , or AAP, offered this statement urging local governments to reopen schools this fall: “The importance of in-person learning is well-documented, and there is already evidence of the negative impacts on children because of school closures in the spring of 2020.”

**Long periods away** from school, the AAP says, interrupts support services for children and often results in social isolation. These factors make it “difficult for schools to identify and address important learning deficits as well as child and adolescent physical or sexual abuse, substance use, depression, and suicidal ideation,” they add.

**“This, in turn** , places children and adolescents at considerable risk.”

**Secretary Azar** spoke on President Trump’s bold actions to both slow the spread of Coronavirus and get America back open for business. “Through this historic response to this unprecedented pandemic, we have the tools to get back to work, back to school, and back to healthcare,” he said.

🎬 [Secretary Azar: We can get American children back to school](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d66e13d264&e=3ee4985eea)

**The CDC** is encouraging schools to have plans in place that will help anticipate cases, minimize spread, and limit the need for school closures. Since every school is unique, each will require a different approach to safely welcome students back to the classroom.

**Secretary DeVos** said the Administration expects children to be back in their learning environments this fall—and urged decision-makers to think practically about the consequences if children do not return to the classroom this year.

🎬 [Secretary DeVos: Different states may require different solutions](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=342fedcae9&e=3ee4985eea)

**“We want to reopen** the schools,” President Trump said. “Everybody wants it. The moms want it. The dads want it. The kids want it. It’s time to do it.” He added that America’s Coronavirus mortality rate is down tenfold from the peak of the crisis.

**Now, as more states safely** **reopen** under [President Trump’s guidelines](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7797ef2558&e=3ee4985eea), local leaders must continue to put the critical needs of America’s children first.

[Get the facts: President Trump supports the safe reopening of American schools](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8faeaa98f2&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 **Watch:**[The Trump Administration is working on all fronts to help students](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=51a08c62e8&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **Second Lady Karen Pence delivers remarks at White House summit on Safely Reopening America’s Schools** | July 7, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=19048db72d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ea4eae5eb2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a87bb0a215)
---

---

The moms want it. The dads want it. The kids want it. It’s time to do it.” He added that America’s Coronavirus mortality rate is down tenfold from the peak of the crisis. Now, as more states safely reopen under , local leaders must continue to put the critical needs of America’s children first. 🎬 Watch: | | Photo of the Day | | Second Lady Karen Pence delivers remarks at White House summit on Safely Reopening America’s Schools | July 7, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team,
**Last week -- thanks to folks like you -- I became the official Democratic nominee for Colorado 's U.S. Senate seat. **I'm so proud of this team and the movement we're building together. But, we cannot rest quite yet.
Senator Rosen said I should reach out today to ask you to own a piece of our campaign by making a contribution. But first, I need a moment to explain why your donation is so important.
July is critical for our campaign. We've officially kicked off the general election, which means it's time to lay the groundwork to flip this Senate seat blue in November. **Remember: Democrats cannot end Mitch McConnell 's Senate majority without winning this seat.**
Since the primary, Republicans have already launched a $9 million negative attack campaign against me. And we expect more to come. If we can't double down in these critical first days of July, I'm worried we'll get drowned out in the final stretch of this election.
I know what this incredible grassroots team is capable of. If we can just raise the financial resources we need to stick to our plan, we can fight back against the GOP's attacks and win this race.
**[So, I am personally asking you to become a Founding Donor by pitching in any amount to my campaign and Jacky Rosen. Every donation will immediately help us launch a paid media campaign to respond to these misleading, nasty attacks from Republican groups.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9b30/4fbb2af3/21ec02fd/5e8060d7/1894785059/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItaGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMDcwNmkiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-hickenlooper?refcode=em200706i&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
This election will be tough. Mitch McConnell won't let us flip a Senate seat without a fight. But we're ready to get the job done.
Let's get to work!
John Hickenlooper

****[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9b30/4fbb2af3/21ec02fd/5e8060d7/1894785059/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItaGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMDcwNmkiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-hickenlooper?refcode=em200706i&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9b30/4fbb2af3/21ec02fd/5e8060d4/1894785059/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible.

Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126

name: Christy Smith
subject: ICYMI: Trump ACA lawsuit is going to the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Late last month, in the dead of night, Donald Trump asked the Supreme Court to dismantle the Affordable Care Act -- and take health care away from millions of people.

While coronavirus case numbers spiked here in California and across the country, and after a report that 27 million Americans may have already lost their employer-sponsored health insurance in the wake of the pandemic, the Trump administration decided it would be the perfect time to strip health care coverage from another 23 million of us when we need it most.

**Let's be clear: Health care is a human right. There is _never_ a good time to take it away.**

But to do so in the middle of a historic pandemic is particularly cruel -- and it's just plain wrong.

**[While Trump was trying to take away health care coverage, Democrats in the House passed a bill to _expand_ the Affordable Care Act (Mike Garcia voted against it). Let's make sure it passes the Senate -- add your name if you support expanding health care coverage.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf7/29776869/9f5b8c2/569eed5c/1805471385/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDdfQUNBcGV0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_ACA?source=em20_200707_ACApet-full")** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf7/29776869/9f5b8c2/569eed5c/1805471385/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDdfQUNBcGV0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_ACA?source=em20_200707_ACApet-full") I know firsthand how tough it can be when you're sick and can't access the treatment you need.

**My own mom, who spent decades working as a nurse and took care of patients with HIV during the early part of the AIDS crisis, couldn't afford her insulin. She hid her rationing from my brothers and me while she waited for Medicare to kick in. She passed away at 67.**

We're one of the richest nations in the world, but our people spend more on prescription drugs than any other.

It's time for our health care system to actually _work for people, not profits._ We need to enhance and expand the ACA, not destroy the law that gave millions of folks access to health insurance for the first time.

**[If you agree, take a minute to add your support to our petition and tell Congress you support expanding the ACA so we can make health care accessible to millions more.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf7/29776869/9f5b8c2/569eed5c/1805471385/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDdfQUNBcGV0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_ACA?source=em20_200707_ACApet-full")** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf7/29776869/9f5b8c2/569eed5c/1805471385/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDdfQUNBcGV0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_ACA?source=em20_200707_ACApet-full") Thank you,

Christy

|
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf7/29776869/9f5b8c2/569eed5d/1805471385/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDdfQUNBcGV0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200707_ACApet-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf7/29776869/9f5b8c2/569eed5d/1805471385/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDdfQUNBcGV0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200707_ACApet-full")
---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf7/29776869/9f5b8c2/569eed5e/1805471385/VEsB/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
PO Box 301, 24307 Magic Mountain Pkwy, Valencia, CA 91355.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf7/29776869/9f5b8c2/569eed5f/1805471385/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baf7/29776869/9f5b8c2/569eed58/1805471385/VEsP/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: important update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Senator Hassan said I should reach out because I have an important update on our race to take back the Senate for Democrats, everyone:
After seeing that I was outraised and that I'm being outspent on the airwaves by my right-wing opponent, the GOP sees New Hampshire as one of their top targets to protect their Senate majority.
So national Republicans are pouring millions into this race, and Donald Trump and Corey Lewandowski just fully endorsed my right-wing opponent -- promising to do whatever it takes to help the GOP buy this seat.
**Even worse, we're falling behind the $30,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks.**

That's why I'm reaching out with incredible news: **A group of donors just activated an emergency match fund to double all grassroots gifts to make sure we can protect this seat!**
With Senate control hinging on New Hampshire's critical race, **missing this goal could put Democrats' fight for the Senate in serious danger. **But this match expires at midnight tomorrow, and we really can't afford to waste a single opportunity to help reach our fundraising targets. That's why I'm asking you to give today and have every dollar doubled:
[**Donate $3 or more right now and make twice the impact to defend New Hampshire's Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5a0/2a380d31/238227f8/f0aedc/1566055395/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA3MDdfbXdoNGNqc19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20200707_mwh4cjs_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

clean_body: Senator Hassan said I should reach out because I have an important update on our race to take back the Senate for Democrats, everyone: After seeing that I was outraised and that I'm being outspent on the airwaves by my right-wing opponent, the GOP sees New Hampshire as one of their top targets to protect their Senate majority. So national Republicans are pouring millions into this race, and Donald Trump and Corey Lewandowski just fully endorsed my right-wing opponent -- promising to do whatever it takes to help the GOP buy this seat. Even worse, we're falling behind the $30,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks. That's why I'm reaching out with incredible news: A group of donors just activated an emergency match fund to double all grassroots gifts to make sure we can protect this seat! With Senate control hinging on New Hampshire's critical race, missing this goal could put Democrats' fight for the Senate in serious danger. But this match expires at midnight tomorrow, and we really can't afford to waste a single opportunity to help reach our fundraising targets. That's why I'm asking you to give today and have every dollar doubled: "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jeanne Shaheen and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" Thanks, Jeanne "" _

body:

**[Will you rush a donation right away to fight back against this attack and ensure MJ wins the runoff?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890151/7f51f7bc/412d501e/4ef606fd/4273376353/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2OTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-CornynAd?refcode=email_20200707.3nd__1690__&amount=10")**

* Sen. Cornyn's team is clearly _terrified_ after seeing polls showing horrible favorability ratings -- **as low as 27%!**
* Mitch McConnell knows that if we flip Texas, we flip the Senate -- and he does NOT want that to happen. That's why the powerful DC special interests have spent big to prop up Sen. Cornyn's campaign.

Sen. Cornyn is on the attack because he's terrified of having to face MJ just a week from now!
